description: Start the provided mission (if it exists) on a dedicated server.
examples:
<sqf>
if (!isServer) exitWith {};

if (isDedicated) then
{
	serverStartMission "TestMission.Malden";
}
else // hasInterface
{
	hint "You must choose a mission now.";
};
</sqf>
name: serverStartMission

ret.desc: [[true]] if the mission could be started on a dedicated server, [[false]] otherwise
